summary: Tested Newsletter admin tab, Export functionality, YouTube embed button in blog editor, and Resend email integration. Fixed React hooks error in AdminBlogTab.jsx. All features working correctly except Resend email requires domain verification.

minor.issue: Resend email fails for external recipients - requires domain verification at resend.com/domains
minor.note: This is expected Resend behavior - not a code bug. Email integration code is correct.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Verify domain at resend.com/domains to enable sending emails to external recipients
OPTIONAL: Set FROM_EMAIL environment variable to use verified domain email
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: React hooks error in AdminBlogTab.jsx - useCallback hooks were called after early return, violating rules of hooks. Moved hooks before the conditional return.
Newsletter API correctly returns subscribers with proper filtering (active_only parameter)
Export functionality correctly generates text file with active subscriber emails
YouTube button in blog editor properly configured with TiptapYoutube extension
Resend integration code is correct - uses background task for async email sending
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test_ prefixed newsletter subscriptions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Newsletter admin tab, export, and YouTube embed all working. Resend email integration is correctly implemented but requires domain verification to send to external recipients (Resend account limitation, not code issue).

details: Newsletter tab displays in admin dashboard
Subscribers table shows email, source, status, subscribed date
Active subscriber count displayed correctly
Show unsubscribed toggle works
Unsubscribe (trash) button available for each subscriber
Export button visible and enabled when subscribers exist
Clicking Export downloads text file with subscriber emails
File named with date: newsletter-subscribers-YYYY-MM-DD.txt
Only active subscribers included in export
YouTube button visible in blog editor toolbar
Clicking button prompts for YouTube URL
TiptapYoutube extension properly configured
React hooks error fixed - hooks now called before conditional return
RESEND_API_KEY correctly set in backend/.env
resend library installed (v2.21.0)
send_welcome_email function correctly implemented with background task
Email sending attempted but fails for external recipients
Error: 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address'
This is Resend's domain verification requirement, not a code bug
To fix: Verify domain at resend.com/domains and update FROM_EMAIL
GET /api/newsletter - returns subscribers list (PASSED)
GET /api/newsletter?active_only=false - returns all including unsubscribed (PASSED)
POST /api/newsletter - creates new subscription (PASSED)
DELETE /api/newsletter/{email} - unsubscribes email (PASSED)

bug_fix_applied.issue: React Hook 'useCallback' is called conditionally - violates rules of hooks
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved useCallback hooks (addLink, addImage, addYoutubeVideo) before the 'if (!editor) return null' statement, and added null checks inside each callback

resend_email_note: The Resend email integration is correctly implemented. The error 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address' is a Resend account limitation, not a code bug. To enable sending to external recipients: 1) Verify a domain at resend.com/domains, 2) Set FROM_EMAIL env var to an email using the verified domain.
